title: Select subset as map
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.id_name_pairs/0` that returns a list of maps `%{id: ..., name: ...}` for all users. Use `select: map(u, [:id, :name])`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: The `select: map(u, [:id, :name])` helper is documented but non-obvious; still a single-step call once known.
research_citation: Ecto.Query hexdocs: 'for maps use select: map(p, [:name])'
